title: Food Library
description: Master reference table for all tracked foods and supplements. Each row defines one food item's nutritional profile per serving. Per-gram rates are NOT stored here — they are computed at query time as (nutrient / grams_per_serving).

food_id.description: Stable primary key. Human-readable kebab-case slug. Must be unique across all rows. Never change after creation — meal_log.csv references this value.

food_name.description: Display name of the food as it appears on the label or in common usage. No leading/trailing whitespace. No consecutive spaces. Must be unique across all rows.

food_category.description: Broad classification of the food item. Used for filtering and display grouping.

brand.description: Brand or manufacturer name. Null for unbranded whole foods (e.g. generic avocado).

grams_per_serving.description: Weight of one serving in grams. This is the denominator for all per-gram rate calculations. Must be > 0.

serving_unit.description: Unit of measure for the serving size. Currently always 'g' (grams). Reserved for future support of volume-based servings.

serving_size_label.description: Human-readable serving size as printed on the label (e.g. '1 oz', '2 gummies', '4 oz'). Used for display only — not used in calculations.

total_fat.description: Total fat in grams per serving.

total_carbs.description: Total carbohydrates in grams per serving.

saturated_fat.description: Saturated fat in grams per serving. Must be <= total_fat.

polyunsaturated_fat.description: Polyunsaturated fat in grams per serving.

monounsaturated_fat.description: Monounsaturated fat in grams per serving.

trans_fat.description: Trans fat in grams per serving.

dietary_fiber.description: Dietary fiber in grams per serving. Must be <= total_carbs.

sugars.description: Total sugars in grams per serving. Must be <= total_carbs.

vitamin_a_mcg_rae.description: Vitamin A in micrograms of Retinol Activity Equivalents (mcg RAE) per serving. This is the canonical reporting unit matching the dashboard goal (900 mcg RAE). Conversion: 1 mcg RAE = 3.333 IU.

vitamin_a_iu.description: Vitamin A in International Units (IU) per serving. Derived from vitamin_a_mcg_rae * 3.333. Stored for label reference and backwards compatibility. Do not use for goal comparison — use vitamin_a_mcg_rae.

vitamin_c_mg.description: Vitamin C in milligrams per serving. Canonical unit matching dashboard goal (500 mg).

vitamin_d_mcg.description: Vitamin D in micrograms (mcg) per serving. Canonical reporting unit matching dashboard goal (50 mcg). Conversion: 1 mcg = 40 IU.

vitamin_d_iu.description: Vitamin D in International Units (IU) per serving. Derived from vitamin_d_mcg * 40. Stored for label reference. Do not use for goal comparison — use vitamin_d_mcg.

calcium_mg.description: Calcium in milligrams per serving. Canonical unit matching dashboard goal (1200 mg).

iron_mg.description: Iron in milligrams per serving. Canonical unit matching dashboard goal (15 mg).

vitamin_d_needs_label_verification.description: Flag indicating that the vitamin_d_mcg and vitamin_d_iu values have not been confirmed against the physical product label. True for foods where 0.1 mcg was carried from the workbook without label confirmation. Set to false once verified.

source_url.description: URL to the product nutrition page (brand website, USDA FoodData Central, or retailer). Used for auditing and future data enrichment. Null if not yet sourced.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this food record was first created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent update to this record. Must be >= created_at.

allOf.description: Fat components must not exceed total fat
